columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency used for the customer's transactions and account balances (e.g., CZK for Czech Koruna).

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer.

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Market segment of the customer (e.g., SME for small to medium-sized enterprise).

columns.name: chain_id
columns.description: Identifier for the chain to which the gas station belongs.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the gas station is located (e.g., CZE for Czech Republic).

columns.name: gas_station_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the gas station.

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Market segment of the gas station (e.g., Discount).

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the product.

columns.name: amount
columns.description: Quantity of the product purchased in the transaction.

columns.name: card_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the card used in the transaction.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer who made the transaction.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date of the transaction in YYYY-MM-DD format.

columns.name: gas_station_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the gas station where the transaction occurred.

columns.name: price
columns.description: Total price of the transaction.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the product purchased.

columns.name: time
columns.description: Time of the transaction in HH:MM:SS format.

columns.name: transaction_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the transaction.

columns.name: consumption
columns.description: Amount of consumption recorded for the customer in the specified month.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Year and month of the consumption record in YYYYMM format.
